scripts.apk:debug: bash -lc 'export JAVA_HOME=$(pwd)/.tooling/jdk17 && export ANDROID_HOME=$(pwd)/.tooling/android-sdk && export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$(pwd)/.tooling/android-sdk && npm --prefix mobile run apk:debug'
scripts.apk:release: bash -lc 'export JAVA_HOME=$(pwd)/.tooling/jdk17 && export ANDROID_HOME=$(pwd)/.tooling/android-sdk && export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$(pwd)/.tooling/android-sdk && npm --prefix mobile run apk:release'
